scenes.reason: General narrative sentence (fallback caption): "Did you just register a Limited Liability Company?"
General narrative sentence (fallback caption): "But if you think you can just hand your raw bank statements to the tax man at the end of the year, you are in for a massive shock."
General narrative sentence (fallback caption): "As a Limited Company, you are legally required to file and pay Company Income Tax, or CIT."
General narrative sentence (fallback caption): "But the tax authority does not accept bank statements."

General narrative sentence (fallback caption): "This means every single transaction on your bank statement must first be sorted into proper bookkeeping records, turned into a Profit and Loss report, and then verified by an auditor."
Multi-month deadline detected: "For existing companies, your CIT and audited accounts must be filed exactly 6 months after your financial year ends."
General narrative sentence (fallback caption): "The secret to a stress-free tax season isn't finding a 'fast' auditor in June; it's maintaining monthly reconciled records throughout the year."
Risk/warning language detected: "Miss this deadline, and the late filing penalties run into hundreds of thousands of Naira."
Before/after language detected: "When your bookkeeping is done correctly every month, the audit process becomes a simple formality rather than a financial nightmare."
General narrative sentence (fallback caption): "Stop waiting until the last minute to organize your books."
General narrative sentence (fallback caption): "Hit the follow button to learn how to stay compliant."
General narrative sentence (fallback caption): "I'm Mobola Jimoh, I make your numbers make sense, so you don't have to stress."
